{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302063519B38D6037E227553822"}"},"total":299},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600966642545509145","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角真的巨可爱，像一个软软的白面团子，没有遇见解阳羽之前就是一个脏兮兮穷的发指的小脏包，遇见解阳羽了就恢复成雪媚娘了哈哈哈哈哈哈，感谢暄宝认的好大哥[偷笑][偷笑]就是更的太少了，大大加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769740610,"group_id":"7574909776526593086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxOFnSzVlTLcevna+eJnwAAFW9Pphp6AJ/VJaCmjQORr","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/086033c4be9e4f3fa42aa4979e14b2bb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792423&x-signature=67wJ9jg3yYYec%2BRcrLeq68lYgrc%3D","user_id":"4189609826210488","user_name":"抹一缕紫藤香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4189609826210488","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574909776526593086","book_info":{"abstract":"　　评分刚出【双楠，主受，万人迷，团宠，升级流，O身穿异世，修仙】
　　祁暄作为一名omega，从小接受的教育便是如何成为一名合格的妻子，虽然还不合格，但对未来的期盼就是嫁一个金龟婿过上米虫般的幸福生活。

　　谁知一场意外，他转眼在异世醒来。

　　脑袋里多出来的系统告诉他，他必须从娇软咸鱼逆袭成异世强者。

　　——锋指之处皆溃，纵横之势无双！

　　祁暄：“？”

　　谁，他吗QAQ？

　　可为了回家，他只能咬牙踏上龙傲天之路。

　　以温柔为刃，以实力为盾，收服对手、集结势力，在修仙界一路狂飙。

　　众人：他明明软得能掐出水，怎么强到离谱？

　　祁暄：别问，问就是系统逼我卷！

　　他专注事业，可身边的人看他的眼神却越来越不对劲。

　　敬业冷峻的系统为他破例，孤僻默然的少主成了结拜大哥，高冷精分的妖修师兄染上偏执，毒舌古怪的丹峰天才紧追不舍，还有热情可爱的年下小狗，忠心耿耿的沉默小弟……
       祁暄沉默。
       这龙傲天剧本对吗！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc283d0ea3de71dcf830f54ad8eb7c7e0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小小比干","author_id":"","book_id":"7574909776526593086","book_name":"龙傲天狗都不，当！当的就是傲天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#502828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589357348813029912","read_count":"13090","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"299943"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"140","tags":"双男主,系统,幻想言情,团宠,异世穿越,古代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c0efcd6319744a7f64f294ab3f6d28b7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386795&x-signature=OmiTte5Xdchx1Q9iNaPh%2B75W%2BSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1917185192112631","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302063519B38D6037E227553822"}"},"relat
